    [global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.ExcludeFromCodeCoverageAttribute]
    internal static partial class RequestDispatcher
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Type-safe dispatch for requests with responses.
        /// Routes each request type to its registered handler with zero reflection.
        /// Configuration: Respects runtime telemetry/logging/statistics flags.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="request">The request to dispatch.</param>
        /// <param name="services">Service provider for handler resolution.</param>
        /// <param name="context">Configuration context for runtime toggles.</param>
        /// <param name="cancellationToken">Cancellation token.</param>
        public static global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<TResponse> Send<TResponse>(
            global::Blazing.Mediator.IRequest<TResponse> request,
            global::System.IServiceProvider services,
            global::Blazing.Mediator.Generated.GeneratedMediatorContext context,
            global::System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            // Core dispatch - always executed with zero reflection
            return request switch
            {
                GetUserQuery q => (global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<TResponse>)(object)SendGetUserQuery(q, services, context, cancellationToken),
                _ => throw new global::System.InvalidOperationException(
                    $"No handler registered for request type '{request.GetType().FullName}'. " +
                    "Ensure the handler is registered in DI and implements IRequestHandler.")
            };
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Dispatches GetUserQuery to its handler.
        /// Configuration: Checks runtime flags for optional telemetry/logging.
        /// </summary>
        private static async global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<UserDto> SendGetUserQuery(
            GetUserQuery request,
            global::System.IServiceProvider services,
            global::Blazing.Mediator.Generated.GeneratedMediatorContext context,
            global::System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            // Optional telemetry (checked at runtime)
            global::System.Diagnostics.Activity? activity = null;
            if (context.IsTelemetryEnabled)
            {
                var activitySource = services.GetService<global::System.Diagnostics.ActivitySource>();
                if (activitySource != null)
                {
                    activity = activitySource.StartActivity("Mediator.Send.GetUserQuery");
                    if (context.CaptureHandlerDetails && activity != null)
                    {
                        activity.SetTag("handler.type", "GetUserQueryHandler");
                        activity.SetTag("request.type", "GetUserQuery");
                        activity.SetTag("response.type", "UserDto");
                    }
                }
            }

            try
            {
                // Core handler invocation - always executed
                var handler = services.GetRequiredService<GetUserQueryHandler>();
                var result = await handler.Handle(request, cancellationToken);

                // Optional statistics tracking
                if (context.EnableRequestMetrics)
                {
                    // TODO: Track success metric
                }

                if (activity != null && context.IsTelemetryEnabled)
                {
                    activity.SetTag("mediator.success", true);
                }

                return result;
            }
            catch (global::System.Exception ex)
            {
                // Optional exception telemetry
                if (context.CaptureExceptionDetails && activity != null)
                {
                    activity.SetTag("mediator.success", false);
                    activity.SetTag("error.type", ex.GetType().Name);
                    activity.SetTag("error.message", ex.Message);
                }

                throw;
            }
            finally
            {
                activity?.Dispose();
            }
        }

    }
